feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 未找到可用供应商的业务对象
entry.content:
需求：通过代码调用业务对象创建供应商，即 BP 的 FLVN01 FLVN01 角色

BP 的业务对象 i_businesspartnertp_3 中只提供了扩展角色功能，但是没有维护如 公司 和 采购组织层级数据。

单独查找供应商相关业务对象，只找到 I_SUPPLIERLISTTP_2 ，但是已经标记为废弃，是否有其他可用的业务对象，能创建和更新供应商的公司和采购层级数据？

entry.title: No data in Cloud SAPS4 HANA
entry.content:
We have provisioned the SAP S4 PERSON_NAME Cloud environment but that's blank fully and we are unable to use it. Kindly help us with sample data in it so that we can use the instance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Report of YCOA accounting accounts against alternative mapped accounts
entry.content:
Hello, SAP friends:

I'm trying to get a report showing the YCOA accounting accounts and the alternative accounts that those companies have mapped, but I can't get it.

I will comment in more detail with a concrete example.

I have this YCOA account: 6023000000

If I go inside and go to the Company Code Assignment section, I have an alternative accounting account (from a local chart of accounts) mapped to a specific company.


So, with this mapping what I want is to be able to see it in a table like the initial one. For example, adding the alternative account column to see this mapping.

6023000000 VS 0060221000

Would it be possible to do that in SAP?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: GST Condition IN TRM
entry.content:
Dear Sir/ Mam


For maintaining GST detail business partner wise there is an app " Map tax cash flow to tax relevant cash flow" but while maintaining this System is asking to saving the same in transport request but as this is just a master data where we need to maintain these tax record at business partner level


Is their a approach to maintain the same directly in Production Server


Thanks


Prerana Sirohiya


PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "WIP is not getting reduced at the time of Partial GR on the Production order"
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question related to the Production order postings in S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I have created a Production Order. I did Partial Goods Issue, Activity Confirmation. For these 2 steps, the WIP entries got posted correctly and verified it. But at the time of Partial goods receipt, the target cost should hit, Actual Cost and WIP should be reduced. Actual cost has been reduced but the WIP is not. Target costs hit correctly. Then I proceeded further by doing Final Goods Issue in order to check the process how it was working, but no WIP entries posted from this process. 

Can anyone tell me the reason/why it was processing like this? Looking for the inputs.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: 生产订单联产品结算规则必填
entry.content:
业务背景：

常规业务场景下，产品的联产品会有产出，但由于生产工艺的临时调整或者产品特性的变化，导致原先设定的联产品未产出

系统功能限制：

存在联产品的生产订单，如果该生产订单中存在已经入库的产品，此时即便是未入库的联产品，也无法从生产订单组件中删除，并且，生产订单中联产品的结算规则，为必填字段，无法设置为空，因此，如果产品未产出，但是因为系统功能的控制，联产品的结算规则同样需要维护，最终会对成本分摊存在影响

entry.title: 依据生产订单预留创建领料申请
entry.content:
业务背景：

基于客户的业务，一个产品一个月维护一张大的生产订单，因此对于生产订单中的原材料需求来讲，只有一个月的总需求，数量，但是生产发生领料时，生产部门需要按照实际到仓库领料的数量填写领料需求，并由仓库人员依据生产部门维护的领料申请，直接将领料申请的数量发料至生产订单

业务需求：

生产部门可以直接依据生产订单组件维护创建领料预留（申请），领料申请的数量与实际到仓库领料数量一致，并且仓库可以直接依据生产部门创建的领料申请过账，物料直接发料至生产订单，因此是否有标准的功能（APP）能够支持此需求？

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query with navigation
entry.content:
I'm creating an custom Analytical Query using cds view annotations (adt) in Public Cloud.

I plan to make it look like this but the amount to be clickable like a hotspot and navigate to another application.

  Period 1Period 2Period 3
GL AccountAssignment ReferenceAmountAmountAmount
12XXXXXXXX100100100

is it possible to achieve this or are there any other approach?

entry.title: Posting failed: Unable to post using posting rule F020 – Bill of Exchange Payable.
entry.content:
Dear expert,

I attempted to create a manual bank statement and selected F020 (Bill of Exchange Payable) as the manual transaction in one of the line items. According to the SAP Help Portal, this posting rule is classified as a one-step posting, meaning it should only affect the bank ledger.

However, upon clicking the Post button, the following information message appeared:

Message: Statement posted: 0 items completed, 1 item not completed

No error or warning messages were displayed within the bank statement itself, so I’m unclear why the posting could not be completed successfully.

Could you kindly advise on the cause or necessary action?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, 

HY

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance   FIN (Finance)

entry.title: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis (MDA) App Fiori App Title?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone!

I have created an MDA App in S/4HANA Public Cloud, Is there any way I can translate my Launchpad App Descriptor Item? The Maintain Translations app doesn't pick it up.

 

Thank you in advances!

entry.title: Standard apps add custom button in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I’m working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I have a requirement to add a custom action button to a standard Fiori application. As we know, direct modification of standard apps is restricted in the public cloud.
Can anyone guide me on the possible extensibility options to achieve this?
Is there any supported way to add a custom button using Developer Extensibility or any?
If not directly possible, is there any standard app developed using RAP BO (Restful ABAP Programming Model) that supports custom action extensions?
Ideally, I want to add some custom button and logic behind that button.

entry.title: Public Cloud: Depreciation Key for Half Year Convention in Chart of Depreciation "IFRS"
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I have the following problem:

We have the depreciation Key “LINH” in Chart of Depreciation “3910”. Here the period control method is set to “006” by SAP standard. Behind that period control method, there are several values that control at what time the system starts to calculate the depreciation of the asset.. This is what our customer needs for local accounting standards. We want to use IFRS as a tax ledger, as we cannot use the extension ledger due to lack of integration with asset accounting. 

Above you can see a screenshot of “LINH”. We see Period Control Method “006”. Under the column “Acq” there is the value 04, which stands for First year convention at half year start date:


This is exactly what we need in the IFRS Chart of Depreciation. So far so good.

Now, the period control method “006” in Chart of Depreciation “IFRS” differs from “006” in “3910”. 
The following screenshot is “006” in “IFRS”: 



As you can see, under column “Acq”, the value is 01, which stands for pro rata at period start date. This means Period Control Method 006 from 3910 is NOT the same as period control method 006 in IFRS. This is the real problem, as the system does not allow us to open the value help of the period control method, to see which method has 04 in acq. We do not have any option to look up, what period control method in Chart of Depreciation “IFRS” has the correct values in the columns to the right. That is also why we cannot fill out the template provided by SAP Support as we do not know what the period control method is controlling in the background. Additionally, we received the following screenshot from the support, which values are possible: 

As we can see, there is no value that has 04 in Aqc Column. Does anybody know any workaround in this regard? I would really appreciate any kind of advice,

Best regards
Elen

entry.title: Custom logic for checking journal entry submitter against approvers
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have a business case

Multiple level Approval for Verify Journal Entry - number of workflow are pre-defined with 5 level base on amount

1. Level_1 <5,000 USD

.Approver 1 :  with userid A

.Approver 2 :  with userid B

2. Level_2 : > 5,001 & < 20,000 USD

Approver 1 :  with userid C

Approver 2 :  with userid D

3. Level_3 : > 20,001 & <200,000 USD

Approver 1 :  with userid E

4. Level_4 : > 200,001 & <500,000 USD

Approver 1 :  with userid F

5. Level_5 : > 500,001 USD

Approver 1 :  with userid G

All approvers are stored on this CDS:  I_RESPYMGMTTEAMMEMBERAPI

Journal Entry - Verify by Requester:

  • CDS VIEW name: C_GLJRNLENTRYTOBEVERIFIED
  • CDS field name: PARKEDBYUSER

which custom logic that can perform checking submitter [PARKEDBYUSER] against approver on CDS view I_RESPYMGMTTEAMMEMBERAPI

and if PARKEDBYUSER is found on which level then that approval level is kept and go to next level.

is it this one?

* Business Context: Journal Entry Verification in General Ledger
* BAdI Description: Value evaluation of additional conditions for scenarios

SCENARIO_ID = WS02800046

if yes, please guide the logic for keep the approval level and go next level

Patrickc

entry.title: Security Audit logs in SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please let me know if we have any option to gather the Security Audit logs of the FF user in Public cloud. Customer is not using IAG and manual EAM process is requested.

Customer is looking something similar to SM19/SM20 logs. We have used 'Display security Audit logs' application but it doesn't show the detailed log of Restriction level changes done by the user.

Can you please suggest the application or any process to get this information?

 

Regards,

Inchara BK

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Security

entry.title: <ReqdExctnDt> has to pick Today + 1 day in payment file
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

Requirement is - Tag <ReqdExctnDt> has to pick today +1day. Currently the tag is picking the payment file generated date. It has to add + 1 day. 

I have configured as Below.

SSCUI ID: 101045

App: Enter amounts for payment program.

DME File(XML).

Not getting +1day in the Payment file

 

System: SAP S4 hana public cloud.

Please let me know why its not picking + 1day in the tag, should I make the changes in the configuration/did I missed to configure anything. 

 

Thanks..

entry.title: How to mass update Sales Orders?
entry.content:
How can we mass update Sales Orders?
What is the scope for updating Custom fields. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Committing the Project Budget during material withdrawal using Reservation
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am currently moving from ECC 6.0 to the Public Cloud. Previously in ECC 6.0, I had set up Budget Control for WBS elements for material withdrawals from the warehouse, and the system would record the commitment at the time of reservation. However, in the Public Cloud, the system does not record a commitment during material withdrawal. How can I resolve this issue?

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: How to maintain Credit Analyst?
entry.content:
Credit Analyst has to be maintained in order to fill this field in Documented Credit Decision (DCD).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV Complete order
entry.content:
I created a purchase order in SAP using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV and have already delivered it. Now I want to complete the order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV.
To do this, I call the API as follows: 
HTTP-Methode ist 'Patch'
https://testfim.com:8443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseOrder('(6222222222')

The request for this is:
{
"PurchasingCompletenessStatus" : "true"
}

HTTP-Response: 
~status_code: 400
~status_reason Bad Request
Message: The data service request contains SystemQueryOptions that are not permitted for this request type.

Does anyone know how to complete an order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV API?
I would appreciate any help.

entry.title: Restrict Tasks created in the Manage My Timesheet app
entry.content:
Hi,

 

In our employee time report, we can see time submitted by users using cost center and activity types only. We only need them to charge on WBS element or non project related task types. Is it possible to limit them on creating tasks using Cost center and activity type only? And how can we do that?

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
